kb-loaded passes 100% in both configs — non-discriminating
The critical differentiator is OUTPUT FORMAT: skill produces structured slotValues JSON ready for template integration, baseline produces free-form text
Copy QUALITY is comparable — both produce good, on-brand text. The skill's value is in STRUCTURE, not creativity
Baseline eval 3 added value the skill missed: suggested matching images from catalog + offered alternative version
Skill overhead is modest: +26s avg, +3.3k tokens — reasonable for the structure it adds
